description.ja: ブラウザ完結の超高速・軽量な個人用リンク管理ポータル。DB不要で即利用可能。
description.en: Ultra-fast and lightweight personal link management portal that runs entirely in the browser. No DB required.

description.ja: 日時業務ライン管理、研修・教育、引継ぎ、人員配置、BCPに対応。
description.en: Supports daily business line management, training/education, handovers, personnel allocation, and BCP.
